meta.title: [AI Access] Applied Analytics from End-to-End
meta.description:
Welcome to our event series AI Access. Get the most critical AI trends, learn about best practices, and deep dive into a real-world use case with current AI practitioners. 

In this event, Zachary Hanif (https://www.linkedin.com/in/zachary-hanif-942bab49/), the Senior Director of Machine Learning from Capital One, will explore a set of machine learning challenges and demonstrate how ML, distributed data engineering, and a product-oriented mindset can result in impactful results. 

For our audience who have registered the Slido ticket, while you are listening to the presentation, please log in to our Slido page to submit your questions or upvote others’. You will find the Slido access link in your registration confirmation email or the reminder emails.

To learn more about us, 
DeepLearning.AI: https://www.deeplearning.ai/

To check out the previous AI Access event where
Patrick Hebron, Director of ML from Adobe talking about Integrating Design and Technical Innovation in AI-First Products: https://youtu.be/kk6rh45r0fo

Stay tuned for DeepLearning.AI future events: https://www.deeplearning.ai/events/
